message:
test(bd-1d6u): add transform.rs async call, default, and schema tests

Cover call_async delegation with mapped args, non-hidden arg with
default used when value missing, optional transform skipped when no
value/default, parent with no description, required array preserved
for unrenamed args, and type_schema replacing entire property.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
